languages.text: {n}Глазные мышцы отказываются вам подчиняться так же, как и все остальные. Впрочем, едва ли в вашем окружении нашлось бы что-то, что помогло в вашей беде.{/n}
{n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Глазные мышцы отказываются вам подчиняться так же, как и все остальные. Впрочем, едва ли в вашем окружении нашлось бы что-то, что помогло в вашей беде.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}
{n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}
{n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの眼の筋肉は、他の体の部位と同じように、あなたの命令に従おうとしない。しかし、あなたの現在の窮状を救うために、あなたの周囲にあるものはほとんどないだろう。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの眼の筋肉は、他の体の部位と同じように、あなたの命令に従おうとしない。しかし、あなたの現在の窮状を救うために、あなたの周囲にあるものはほとんどないだろう。{/n}

languages.text: {n}你眼部的肌肉不听使唤，就像你身体的其他部分一样。然而，这周围似乎没什么东西能帮你摆脱眼前的困境。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你眼部的肌肉不听使唤，就像你身体的其他部分一样。然而，这周围似乎没什么东西能帮你摆脱眼前的困境。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los músculos de tus ojos se niegan a obedecerte, al igual que el resto de tu cuerpo. No obstante, es muy poco probable que tus alrededores puedan servirte de ayuda en tu situación actual.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los músculos de tus ojos se niegan a obedecerte, al igual que el resto de tu cuerpo. No obstante, es muy poco probable que tus alrededores puedan servirte de ayuda en tu situación actual.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Muskeln deines Gesichtes gehorchen dir nicht mehr ... genau wie der Rest deines Körpers. Allerdings besteht kaum eine Chance, dass dir irgendetwas in deiner Umgebung in deiner misslichen Lage helfen kann.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The muscles in your eyes refuse to obey you, just like the rest of your body. However, there is little chance that anything in your surroundings could help you in your present predicament.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Muskeln deines Gesichtes gehorchen dir nicht mehr ... genau wie der Rest deines Körpers. Allerdings besteht kaum eine Chance, dass dir irgendetwas in deiner Umgebung in deiner misslichen Lage helfen kann.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les muscles de vos yeux refusent de vous obéir, comme le reste de votre corps. Cependant, il est peu probable que vous trouviez quoi que ce soit aux alentours qui puisse vous aider à vous sortir de cette situation délicate.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Gözlerindeki kaslar da tıpkı bedeninin geri kalanı gibi sana itaat etmeyi reddediyor. Ancak çevrendeki herhangi bir şeyin şu anki zor durumunda sana yardımcı olma ihtimali çok düşük.{/n}
